hooks.command: jq -r '[.message, .user_message, .text, .prompt, .content] | map(select(. != null)) | join(" ") | ascii_downcase' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'frontend\|ui\|component\|design\|page\|interface\|style\|aesthetic\|build.*page\|create' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Frontend work detected: Apply the frontend-design skill from SKILL.md. Remember: bold aesthetic direction, distinctive typography (avoid Inter/Roboto), creative animations, spatial composition (asymmetry, overlap, negative space), visual details (gradients, textures, patterns), and avoid generic AI aesthetics."}}' || true
